title: hieracium subcaesium subsp. subscalenum
intro: Hieracium subcaesium subsp. subscalenum is a subspecies of the Hieracium subcaesium plant, commonly known as hawkweed or false hawkweed, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subcaesium subsp. subscalenum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain diseases, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water or using them in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
